articles.title: LINK Price Primed For Meteoric Rise: Analyst Predicts 130% Rally To $18
articles.description: The LINK price is no stranger to bullish rallies, and in September alone, the token has gone from a low of $5.8 to a peak of $7.9. Even now, bullish momentum among enthusiasts has not waned, especially with a 130% price increase prediction from a crypto analyst. LINK Price Prediction Ahead Of October In the analysis posted to TradingView, pseudonymous analyst Babenski explains the reasoning...
